title: Location Management + Map UI Polish
summary: Location sheet state flow, saved address decisions, map pickup chrome, and nearby hospital card polish.

changes.message: Refined LocationSheet mode ownership so search, saved-place, and success states use the correct sheet header and snap behavior.
Fixed selected-location decision flow so save success can return with the fresh saved address instead of stale candidate data.
Added a focused post-save state with clear 'Use As Pickup' and 'Done' actions after saving Home, Work, or other places.
Updated nearby hospital hero card copy with a compact 'Browse' action and lighter typography for better scan balance.
Introduced fade-end clipping for dense hospital titles so long names no longer rely on visible ellipsis.
Applied the same fade-end clipping treatment to the expanded pickup location chrome address.
Documented the iVisit fade-end text rule and pending global FadeEndText / ClippedTextFade pass.
Preserved recent LocationSheet fixes for manual entry access, recents empty state, keyboard handling, and mode transitions.
Carries forward recent map stability fixes for hospital preservation, sheet snap transitions, ambulance sprite orientation, and marker guards.
